title: Spare the Animals
description: You like animals? You don't wanna kill them? Even in a game? This data pack/mod helps you avoid killing innocent animals in Minecraft. Vegan and vegetarian people might like this data pack/mod.
body: You like animals? You don't wanna kill them? Even in a game? This data pack/mod helps you avoid killing innocent animals in Minecraft. Books are essential, so you need leather. You can barely obtain leather without killing animals in Minecraft Vanilla. This data pack/mod makes zombies drop leather, skeletons drop feathers. Since version 2.0 there are also new recipes for black dye, ink sacs and glow ink sacs. In version 3.0.0 the crafting recipes have been greatly reworked. This project contains data packs and (Neo)Forge mods. I recommend to use a data pack instead of a mod because it can be run on Minecraft Vanilla and you don't need a mod loader to use a data pack. The mod part has switched from Forge to NeoForge. License: CC BY miraisoft
